author: KATHERINE RODGERS
review: My wife and I met with different realtors through Zillow/ Redfin on our house hunt. We stuck with Ronda because she was so knowledgeable. As first time homebuyers, it was important for us to feel confident with our realtor. Everything went

ownerResponse.text: Thank you Katherine! You and your wife were a pleasure to work with:) Ronda

author: Jenna Harris
review: Ronda is an incredible real estate agent! We feel SO grateful that we had her by our side throughout the entire process. We researched local real estate agents and spoke to a few prior to making a decision. Ronda stood out to us immediately

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much Jenna! I need to come meet that cute new little puppy that you adopted:)

author: Andrew Mitton
review: Ronda has been absolutely amazing to work with every step of the way. She took the time to really understand exactly what we were looking for in our real estate purchase. Each step of the way Ronda and the team were so supportive and

ownerResponse.text: Thank you Andrew! I loved working with you and your family, so much so that I get to actually call you next door neighbors:) Ronda

author: Garrett Reynolds
review: Ronda did great for us.  She was very patient with us especially considering we were initially out of state buyers and she was facilitating remote viewings.  It's a very competitive market in our area and she worked very hard to find

ownerResponse.text: Thank you Garrett! I enjoyed getting to know you and your family. Welcome back to the Pacific Northwest! Ronda

author: S Smith
review: Ronda is the best!  She is very hard working, communicates well, and really cares about her clients.   She knows the market and helps her clients connect with the best possible homes to meet their needs.  Highly recommended!

ownerResponse.text: Thank you Steve for appreciating my service. I do really care for my clients and am so excited to have helped you find the perfect home in our beautiful city! Ronda

author: Robin Riggs
review: Ronda was such a pleasure to work with.  Her extensive knowledge with the real estate industry was off the charts!  She was extremely responsive and very professional.  I would recommend her to anyone that I can!

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much Robin! You were amazing to work with as a seller too, I hope we continue our new friendship!

author: Beth Williams
review:
Ronda is the absolute BEST !!!  She is kind, patient and extremely knowledgeable.  She always looks out for the best interest of her clients.
She can be firm with the builders when appropriate.  We have purchased many homes and she is our #1.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Beth, I adore you and had a great time finding you the perfect home. Ronda

author: Holly Trucano
review: Dont know how she got my personal information but Ronda started emailing me constantly and after I unsubscribed from her emails she texted to try and sell her services again. She seems very pushy and desperate to be emailing and texting

ownerResponse.text: Sorry Holly, I received your information because you at one time looked at my website at some homes in my market. I apologize if I contacted you too frequently.

author: Jodi Heimgartner
review: Rhonda is very professional and a pleasure to work with.  We were relocating from another state and Rhonda stepped in to do our walk thru and anything else we needed as we couldn't be there in person.  We would highly recommend Rhonda's services.

ownerResponse.text: Thanks Jodi, I truly enjoyed helping you relocate! Ronda

author: Molly Wilson
review: Rhonda is extremely professional and will go out of her way to find you the right home.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you Molly, you are the best! Ronda
